parents.subject: LU-17022 obdclass: change further flags to bitops

commit.subject: LU-17022 obdclass: change 4 flags to bitops
commit.message:
LU-17022 obdclass: change 4 flags to bitops

	obd_no_ir:1,		/* no imperative recovery. */
	obd_process_conf:1,	/* device is processing mgs config */
	obd_checksum_dump:1,	/* dump pages upon cksum error */
	obd_dynamic_nids:1,	/* Allow dynamic NIDs on device */

are now

	OBDF_NO_IR,		/* no imperative recovery. */
	OBDF_PROCESS_CONF,	/* device is processing mgs config */
	OBDF_CHECKSUM_DUMP,	/* dump pages upon cksum error */
	OBDF_DYNAMIC_NIDS,	/* Allow dynamic NIDs on device */

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Mr NeilBrown <neilb@suse.de>
Change-Id: I204596fbb37ee9c6ec8dfeba9a8a006f6fecbc58
